audio_identity.overall_style: weak sound effects and monotonous music (per GamePro review)

notes: No detailed musical parameters (tempo, keys, chord progressions, time signatures, modes, loops) are documented in available sources. TCRF source contained only metadata/navigation content with no game-specific audio information. Wikipedia provides composer credit (Naoki Itamura) and critical assessment noting 'weak sound effects' and 'monotonous music' in SNES version, but no technical audio specifications. Track-by-area data and SFX characteristics per character are not documented.
